label: Read Obsidian notes
describe: Read Markdown from a local Obsidian vault by path or full-text search, so the agent can cite the user's personal knowledge base. Use when the task references the user's notes, prior decisions, or any local-only knowledge. Read-only: never mutates the vault. Returns matched notes with their path, title, and content. Prefer a specific `vault` when the user has more than one; if omitted, the user's default vault is used. For search, pass a natural-language or keyword `query`; for a direct fetch, pass an exact `path`.

query.description: Full-text or keyword search query. Mutually optional with `path`.

vault.description: Vault name; omit to use the default vault.

skills.label: How to cite the user's vault

extras._note: The local-rest transport authenticates to the Obsidian Local REST API with a bearer key resolved via PlatformServices.resolveSecret('obsidian-rest-api-key') — declared as an ExtensionSecretRef {name:'obsidian-rest-api-key', attach:'bearer'} on this source's ExtensionManifest. The secret lives under ~/.plexus/secrets/ and never appears in this entry, the manifest, .well-known, or audit.
